news.summary: At TechCrunch's sold-out StrictlyVC event in San Francisco on Thursday night, we covered a lot of ground in a short time, beginning with the question everyone in the industry is asking right now: in a world where rival Cursor is reportedly in talks to be acquired by SpaceX for $60 billion, is Replit

news.title: Musely secures $360M from General Catalyst without giving up equity
news.summary: The DTC skin, hair, and menopause care brand will use the non-dilutive capital to super-charge customer acquisition.

news.title: Meta buys robotics startup to bolster its humanoid AI ambitions
news.summary: Meta bought humanoid startup Assured Robot Intelligence to beef up its AI models for robots, the company said.

news.title: Coatue has a plan to buy up land for data centers, possibly for Anthropic
news.summary: Coatue, one of the biggest names in venture capital, has a new venture that is reportedly buying land near large power sources.

news.title: Pentagon inks deals with Nvidia, Microsoft, and AWS to deploy AI on classified networks
news.summary: The deals come as the DOD has doubled down on diversifying its exposure to AI vendors in the wake of its controversial dispute with Anthropic over usage terms of its AI models.

news.title: Splatoon Raiders preorders for the Switch 2 are nearly 20 percent off
news.summary: Nintendo recently announced a new pricing policy, which knocks $10 off the cost of digital versions of future first-party titles exclusive to the Nintendo Switch 2. news.title: Microsoft tests redesigned Windows 11 Run menu with dark mode and more
news.summary: Microsoft is testing its much-needed refresh for the Windows 11 Run menu, offering a modern interface that the company says is faster and comes with support for dark mode. The redesign is rolling out now to Windows 11 Insiders in the new Experimental Channel. In a blog post explaining the changes, M

news.title: Apple raises the Mac Mini’s starting price
news.summary: Apple's Mac Mini now starts at $799 after the company pulled the $599 option with 256GB of storage from its online store, as spotted earlier by MacRumors. news.title: All the evidence revealed so far in Musk v. Altman
news.summary: The Musk v. Altman trial is underway, and that means exhibits, or the evidence to be presented in court, are being revealed piece by piece. news.title: Birdfy’s smart bird feeder is down to its best-ever price for Mother’s Day
news.summary: From crafting machines to smart calendars, a number of unique gifts are already on sale in the run-up to Mother’s Day, May 10th. news.title: Study: AI models that consider user's feeling are more likely to make errors
news.summary: Overtuning can cause models to "prioritize user satisfaction over truthfulness.”

news.title: The RAMpocalypse has bought Microsoft valuable time in the fight against SteamOS
news.summary: Op-ed: Valve has made a dent in Windows' gaming share, but can it keep going?

news.title: Man dies covered in necrotic lesions after amoebas eat him alive
news.summary: Doctors suspect three factors, each unremarkable on its own, contributed to his fate.

news.title: Ubuntu infrastructure has been down for more than a day
news.summary: The outage has hampered communication concerning a critical vulnerability that gives root.

news.title: Senators ban themselves from prediction markets after candidates bet on own races
news.summary: Senator decries "blatant, brazen corruption," wants to target Trump admin next.

news.title: Waymo Is Trying to Crack Down on Solo Kids in Driverless Cars
news.summary: As adult riders report new age-verification checks, the self-driving car company says it’s continuing to “refine” its system in places where kids aren’t allowed to ride alone.

news.title: OpenAI Enables Marketing Cookies by Default for Free ChatGPT Users
news.summary: ChatGPT’s new privacy policy states how the company uses cookies for tracking, to turn free users into paying subscribers.

news.title: Dangerous New Linux Exploit Gives Attackers Root Access to Countless Computers
news.summary: The exploit, dubbed CopyFail and tracked as CVE-2026-31431, allows hackers to take over PCs and data center servers. The Linux vulnerabilities have been patched—but many machines remain at risk.

news.title: A Dark-Money Campaign Is Paying Influencers to Frame Chinese AI as a Threat
news.summary: Build American AI, a nonprofit linked to a super PAC bankrolled by executives at OpenAI and Andreessen Horowitz, is funding a campaign to spread pro-AI messaging and stoke fears about China.

news.title: This Eye-Catching Indoor Garden Is 20 Percent Off Right Now
news.summary: Lettuce Grow’s Farmstand is sure to impress, and it’s 20 percent off for Mother’s Day.
